description:
Several editor components exceed reasonable single-file size:
- PcmSynthEditor.tsx: 1474 lines
- PcmDrumEditor.tsx: 1226 lines
- SnSynthEditor.tsx: 913 lines

These monolithic files mix parameter layout, MIDI communication, and UI rendering.

Fix: Extract logical sections (Common, MFX, Partial1-4) into separate sub-components.
Each section should own its parameter reads/writes. The parent editor orchestrates
layout and part selection only.
title: Break up oversized editor components
